programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers look for textbooks and rare university artifacts in Fullerton, Calif.; Barry uncovers antique vinyl; Jarrod and Brandi battle their colleagues.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Police and Highway Patrol pull a shoplifting suspect to safety after he hangs from a highway overpass; deputies, air units and K-9 officers chase down a suspect on foot and in the water.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A desperate couple hold a truck driver hostage in his own semi; marine patrol deputies chase down smugglers in a high-speed boat chase; officers report a late-night pursuit of a suspect fleeing in reverse.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A truck thief streams his high-speed chase on social media; a man wanted for double murder fires shots at pursuing officers; a man caught sleeping at a traffic light flees police and crashes a high-end sports car; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape

programme.desc: A naked man makes a scene on a Miami Beach; a woman without clothes causes a disturbance at a convenience store; a man gets undressed on a homeowner's doorstep.

programme.desc: A school principal is arrested in connection with an underage party; a man performs lewd acts with a mailbox slot; a man who loves his pet chicken is arrested for burglary, and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: Two senior citizens get locked up for trespassing while trapping stray cats; a man is arrested after pouring milk on his head while streaking through a store; police search for a man who tried to steal a wheelchair while its owner was still in it.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
